title: MARCH 2025 FLOOD CLEAN UP SURVEY - 211info
text: NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES HARNEY COUNTY MARCH 2025 FLOOD CLEAN UP SURVEY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a survey form to submit information to obtain assistance in pumping water out of a crawl space or basement, mucking and gutting, and debris cleanup due to the March 2025 flood. Confidential Address Eligibility: Residents who experienced damage during the March 2025 flood Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Post Disaster Cleanup Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - MARCH 2025 FLOOD DAMAGE ASSESSMENT FORM DISASTER SERVICES - MARCH 2025 FLOOD INFORMATION DISASTER SERVICES - MARCH 2025 FLOOD SANDBAGS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES HARNEY COUNTY
